originalAlarm.description: Potential leak of memory pointed to by 'buf'

reasoning: eef2317b9f5.c L34: 'Potential leak of memory pointed to by buf'. When CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP=F, buf is allocated via malloc(bufsize) at L26 (when cmd!=8) but never freed — no free() call exists outside the #ifdef CLEAN_UP block. This is a genuine memory leak. PC=!CONFIG_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP correctly identifies the condition under which the leak occurs. New bug (no ERROR comment for the leak itself). Correctly constrained PC.
